mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.title, m.name AS write_name, p.view_count, p.created_at FROM posts p JOIN members m ON p.member_id = m.member_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' order by p.post_id DESC

SELECT p.post_id, p.member_id, p.title, p.content, m.name AS write_name, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN members m ON p.member_id = m.member_id where p.post_id = ${postId} AND p.deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count+1 where post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
